name: Red Sea / Suez Canal
summary: Day 75-76 quiet — UKMTO/MARAD/JMIC: 'no incidents have been recorded in the Red Sea since September 2025.' MARAD 2026-006 advisory + gCaptain coverage confirm operational quiet through May 4 Iran multi-axis kinetic restart AND May 5 Trump Project Freedom pause cycle. Container freight FBX est. ~$2,800-2,900/FEU (per Freightos recent reports), stable at elevated baseline — Red Sea + Hormuz dual-chokepoint pricing persists. The bifurcation: Red Sea track is operationally clean, but Hormuz remains the kinetic-pressure point. The Houthi non-response across the highest-stress events of the crisis (May 4 kinetic, May 5 pause-with-progress) durably validates the Soufan coordination-decay thesis. Yemen May 2 oil-tanker hijacking headed for Somalia is SEPARATE piracy, not Houthi attack. If 75 days of Hormuz escalation + kinetic restart cycle did not produce Houthi Red Sea kinetic, the operational linkage to Iran is structurally broken or deliberately held in deep reserve.

active_triggers.condition: Houthis attack commercial shipping in the Red Sea
